selection_basis.ledger_reason: This is the strongest postsweep active-system source-of-sources packet and the cleanest bridge to a later operator-facing capsule.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the completed active-system cross-batch parent into a smaller four-cluster authority map without reopening raw families, replacing the parent batches, or inflating operator convenience into higher authority.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next bounded operator-facing capsule once the cross-batch authority map is stabilized.
Strongest later thin-entry reduction after the thicker capsule layer is preserved.
Strongest later verification packet once the operator-facing reduction stack is narrowed.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent batch already carries the full eleven-batch active-system reduction, and the consulted A2-mid anchors already sharpen the A2, A1, and outer-shell sublineages needed for this bounded synthesis pass.

candidate_items.name: FOUR_CLUSTER_ACTIVE_SYSTEM_MAP
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's cleanest reusable structural map for later operator-facing reductions.

candidate_items.name: NARROW_ACTIVE_AUTHORITY_STACK_INSIDE_WIDE_HELPER_SHELL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the parent packet's strongest cross-batch authority rule explicit.

candidate_items.name: A2_KERNEL_HIERARCHY_WITH_REGENERABLE_DERIVED_STATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Combines the stable A2 hierarchy with the nonowner derived-state split in one reusable packet.

candidate_items.name: A1_FAMILY_PATH_CAMPAIGN_WITH_CONSERVATIVE_LIVE_MAP
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps current A1 identity and live-family placement together without collapsing campaign and normalization doctrine.

candidate_items.name: ENTROPY_LANE_REMAINS_MAIN_OPEN_PRACTICAL_BOTTLENECK
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's strongest shared unresolved operational pressure.

candidate_items.name: TRANSPORT_AND_RUNTIME_LAW_STAY_NARROWER_THAN_ENGINEERING_SHELL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the hard transport/runtime fences and the wider shell around them visible at the same time.

quarantined_items.name: CROSSBATCH_REDUCTION_AS_REPLACEMENT_FOR_PARENT_BATCHES
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly remains a source-of-sources layer rather than a substitute for the thicker eleven-batch lineage beneath it.

quarantined_items.name: OPERATOR_FACING_SYNTHESIS_AS_AUTHORITY_INFLATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent repeatedly preserves a narrow authority stack inside a wide operational shell, so convenience synthesis must not widen authority.

notes: This batch is proposal-side only and preserves the completed active-system sweep as a smaller four-cluster authority map rather than a replacement narrative.
No raw source reread and no active append-save were performed.
